LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshboundFieldPack.label: forge ashbound field pack
LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshboundFieldPack.description: Assemble a compact field pack from steel bracing, residue canisters and a restrained harness frame.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftRelayPack.label: forge rift relay pack
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftRelayPack.description: Forge a relay-grade abyssal pack around a compact rift conduit and reinforced load frame.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownConduitPack.label: forge crown conduit pack
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownConduitPack.description: Construct a crown-tier conduit pack around a crowned core fragment, plated relay spine and late-line canister lattice.
